args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') AND Date LIKE '2018-%' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') AND Date LIKE '2018-%' GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview: "GSPTSE (44 up days, 41 down days) and IXIC (44 up days, 31 down days)."

args.answer: GSPTSE (44 up days, 41 down days) and IXIC (44 up days, 31 down days).

val_args.answer: GSPTSE (44 up days, 41 down days) and IXIC (44 up days, 31 down days).
